title: vault: VAULT_TOKEN not wrapped in Zeroizing before use
description: secretx-hashicorp-vault/src/lib.rs reads VAULT_TOKEN via std::env::var() which returns a plain String. This string is passed to build_vault_client() and then goes out of scope without explicit zeroing. The std env::var() result is not zeroized. Trigger: any VaultBackend construction → VAULT_TOKEN value lives in heap as a plain String until allocator recycles the memory.
